features: High-Capacity Battery: This battery is a 9.6V 2800mah AA rechargeable battery with Tamiya plug, and comes with a convenient USB charging cable.
Compatibility: It is compatible with various toys, excavators, cars, trucks, tanks, engineering vehicles, remote control ships, RC toy cars, rechargeable batteries.
High-Quality Materials: Made of high-quality materials, this battery is reliable and long-lasting for extended use.

Compact and Lightweight: It has a compact design with dimensions of 100X58X15mm and weighs only 180g, making it easy to carry on-the-go. Note: Please check the plug and size of your RC toy battery before placing an order for batteries.
Package list: 2PCS lithium battery + 2PCS charging cable
description: ZYGY 2PCS 9.6V 2800mah AA Rechargeable Batteries with Tamiya Plug with USB Charging Cable for RC Cars Trucks Tanks Engineering Cars RC Boats Battery details: Battery voltage: 9.6V Battery capacity: 2800mAh Battery weight: 180g/1PCS Battery size: L3.94(in) X W2.28(in) X D0.59(in) Discharge connector: Tamiya plug Charging connector: Tamiya plug Charging cable working state: 1: Charger USB port DC5V 2. Charger output DC 11.2V 250mA 3. USB charging cable is powered on red light is on long time 4. (LED red light flashes slowly, charging) - (LED red light goes out, fully charged) 5. Auto stop charging when fully charged Battery precautions: 1. Turn off the device when the battery is low to avoid deep discharge. 2. Always disconnect the battery from the device when not in use. 3. Do not use or charge the battery if it is bloated, swollen, leaking, overheating or any other abnormalities. 4. Do not disassemble, puncture, shock or damage the battery. Do not light the battery on fire. 5. Do not overcharge the battery. Improper use, such as short-circuiting or overcharging, may result in an explosion or fire.
